scripts.seed:resources:kentucky: RESOURCES_DEFAULT_STATE=Kentucky RESOURCES_UUID_PREFIX=d1000001 RESOURCES_SEED_OUTPUT=supabase/seed-kentucky-resources.sql RESOURCES_INCLUDE_CATEGORIES=false npx tsx scripts/generate-resources-seed.ts data/kentucky-resources.csv
scripts.seed:resources:ohio: python3 scripts/build-ohio-resources.py && python3 scripts/enrich-resources.py data/ohio-resources.csv --write-json data/enrichments/ohio-enriched.json && RESOURCES_DEFAULT_STATE=Ohio RESOURCES_UUID_PREFIX=d2000001 RESOURCES_SEED_OUTPUT=supabase/seed-ohio-resources.sql RESOURCES_INCLUDE_CATEGORIES=false npx tsx scripts/generate-resources-seed.ts data/ohio-resources.csv
scripts.seed:resources:indiana: python3 scripts/build-indiana-resources.py && python3 scripts/enrich-resources.py data/indiana-resources.csv --write-json data/enrichments/indiana-enriched.json && RESOURCES_DEFAULT_STATE=Indiana RESOURCES_UUID_PREFIX=d3000001 RESOURCES_SEED_OUTPUT=supabase/seed-indiana-resources.sql RESOURCES_INCLUDE_CATEGORIES=false npx tsx scripts/generate-resources-seed.ts data/indiana-resources.csv
scripts.seed:resources:tennessee: python3 scripts/build-tennessee-resources.py && python3 scripts/enrich-resources.py data/tennessee-resources.csv --write-json data/enrichments/tennessee-enriched.json && RESOURCES_DEFAULT_STATE=Tennessee RESOURCES_UUID_PREFIX=d4000001 RESOURCES_SEED_OUTPUT=supabase/seed-tennessee-resources.sql RESOURCES_INCLUDE_CATEGORIES=false npx tsx scripts/generate-resources-seed.ts data/tennessee-resources.csv
scripts.seed:resources:michigan: python3 scripts/build-michigan-resources.py && python3 scripts/enrich-resources.py data/michigan-resources.csv --write-json data/enrichments/michigan-enriched.json && RESOURCES_DEFAULT_STATE=Michigan RESOURCES_UUID_PREFIX=d5000001 RESOURCES_SEED_OUTPUT=supabase/seed-michigan-resources.sql RESOURCES_INCLUDE_CATEGORIES=false npx tsx scripts/generate-resources-seed.ts data/michigan-resources.csv
scripts.seed:resources:illinois: python3 scripts/build-illinois-resources.py && python3 scripts/enrich-resources.py data/illinois-resources.csv --write-json data/enrichments/illinois-enriched.json && RESOURCES_DEFAULT_STATE=Illinois RESOURCES_UUID_PREFIX=d6000001 RESOURCES_SEED_OUTPUT=supabase/seed-illinois-resources.sql RESOURCES_INCLUDE_CATEGORIES=false npx tsx scripts/generate-resources-seed.ts data/illinois-resources.csv
scripts.seed:resources:west-virginia: python3 scripts/sync-county-benefits-offices.py --state west-virginia && python3 scripts/build-west-virginia-resources.py && python3 scripts/enrich-resources.py data/west-virginia-resources.csv --write-json data/enrichments/west-virginia-enriched.json && RESOURCES_DEFAULT_STATE=West Virginia RESOURCES_UUID_PREFIX=d7000001 RESOURCES_SEED_OUTPUT=supabase/seed-west-virginia-resources.sql RESOURCES_INCLUDE_CATEGORIES=false npx tsx scripts/generate-resources-seed.ts data/west-virginia-resources.csv
scripts.seed:resources:all: npm run seed:resources:kentucky && npm run seed:resources:ohio && npm run seed:resources:indiana && npm run seed:resources:tennessee && npm run seed:resources:michigan && npm run seed:resources:illinois && npm run seed:resources:west-virginia && npm run generate:us-map
scripts.tag:intake: npx tsx scripts/tag-intake-signals.ts data/kentucky-resources.csv && npx tsx scripts/tag-intake-signals.ts data/ohio-resources.csv && npx tsx scripts/tag-intake-signals.ts data/indiana-resources.csv && npx tsx scripts/tag-intake-signals.ts data/tennessee-resources.csv && npx tsx scripts/tag-intake-signals.ts data/michigan-resources.csv && npx tsx scripts/tag-intake-signals.ts data/illinois-resources.csv && npx tsx scripts/tag-intake-signals.ts data/west-virginia-resources.csv
scripts.tag:intake:dry: npx tsx scripts/tag-intake-signals.ts data/kentucky-resources.csv --dry-run && npx tsx scripts/tag-intake-signals.ts data/ohio-resources.csv --dry-run
scripts.tag:intake:llm: npx tsx scripts/tag-intake-signals.ts data/kentucky-resources.csv --llm --write-json data/enrichments/intake-signals-ky-llm.json && npx tsx scripts/tag-intake-signals.ts data/ohio-resources.csv --llm --write-json data/enrichments/intake-signals-ohio-llm.json
scripts.audit:coverage: python3 scripts/check-tier-a-county-coverage.py && python3 scripts/audit-category-gaps.py && python3 scripts/generate-research-backlog.py
scripts.audit:all: npm run audit:coverage && npm run audit:data-quality && npm run audit:featured
